message:
feat: Add string column support and build targets for Node.js/Python

Build system:
- Add SQL module definitions and test step (test-sql)
- Add Python shared library target (zig build lib)
- Add Node.js shared library target (zig build lib-nodejs)
- Add cross-compilation targets for NPM prebuilds

String support:
- Add PlainDecoder.readAllStrings() for Lance string columns
- Add Table.readStringColumn/ByName() methods
- Handle Lance string format (offsets + data buffers)

Schema improvements:
- Handle Lance v2 wrapper format in schema parsing
- Add physicalColumnId() for field ID lookup
- Add getFieldById() for reverse lookup

Safety:
- Replace unreachable with proper error returns in PlainDecoder
